context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: (1) /api/diagnostics.resolver.skip_reasons has 4 keys: no_market=11, no_end_date=25, not_expired=2, already_checked=0. (2) /api/analytics/pnl-history has latest_close_at (ISO timestamp when close_trades>0) and server_time (current UTC). (3) Market snapshots are persisted and loaded from MongoDB on restart - 25 markets loaded from DB reduced no_market skips from ~36 to 11. MongoDB has 2400+ trades, 370 closed, 40 positions. Note: The 11 remaining no_market positions may be from markets never persisted or markets with resolution edge cases.
